t:  0 (CHANNEL), l: 3, v: 0x000019
t:  1 (PANID), l: 2, v: 0x1234
t:  2 (EXTPANID), l: 8, v: 0xdeadbeefcafebabe
t:  3 (NETWORKNAME), l: 7, v: b'TestNet'
t:  4 (PSKC), l: 16, v: 0x55545756515053525d5c5f5e59585b5a
t:  5 (NETWORKKEY), l: 16, v: 0xa0a1a2a3a4a5a6a7a8a9aaabacadaeaf
t:  7 (MESHLOCALPREFIX), l: 8, v: 0xfd11223344556677
t: 12 (SECURITYPOLICY), l: 4, v: 0x02a0fff8
t: 14 (ACTIVETIMESTAMP), l: 8, v: 0x0000000000010000
t: 53 (CHANNELMASK), l: 8, v: 0x000800000000e0f0
